task: Place the silver spoon in the glass container and put the silver lid on the container.
raw:
Scene: silver_spoon, silver_lid, glass_container, table
Step 1: reach(silver_spoon)
  affordance_region: the body of the silver spoon
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, silver_spoon, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, silver_spoon) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(silver_spoon)
  affordance_region: the handle of the silver spoon
  contact: holding(silver_spoon) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(silver_spoon)
Step 3: place(silver_spoon -> glass_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the glass container
  contact: surface_contact(silver_spoon, glass_container) [completion]; released(silver_spoon) [completion]
  spatial: inside(silver_spoon, glass_container) [completion]
  safety: support_stable(silver_spoon)
  done_when: surface_contact(silver_spoon, glass_container) AND released(silver_spoon) AND inside(silver_spoon, glass_container)
Step 4: reach(silver_lid)
  affordance_region: the body of the silver lid
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, silver_lid, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, silver_lid) < 0.03
Step 5: grasp(silver_lid)
  affordance_region: the handle of the silver lid
  contact: holding(silver_lid) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(silver_lid)
Step 6: place(silver_lid -> glass_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the glass container
  contact: surface_contact(silver_lid, glass_container) [completion]; released(silver_lid) [completion]
  spatial: on(silver_lid, glass_container) [completion]
  safety: support_stable(silver_lid)
  done_when: surface_contact(silver_lid, glass_container) AND released(silver_lid) AND on(silver_lid, glass_container)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the silver spoon
the handle of the silver spoon
an empty area on the glass container
steps.done_when: surface_contact(silver_spoon, glass_container) AND released(silver_spoon) AND inside(silver_spoon, glass_container)

steps.affordance_region: the body of the silver lid
the handle of the silver lid
an empty area on the glass container
steps.done_when: surface_contact(silver_lid, glass_container) AND released(silver_lid) AND on(silver_lid, glass_container)
